description_long: This is a rugged, open-top all-terrain vehicle with a yellow and black body, designed for off-road performance. It features large, knobby tires for enhanced traction, a reinforced metal frame, and a visible roll cage for occupant safety. The front is equipped with a protective bumper and multiple auxiliary lights mounted above the windshield, while the rear carries a spare tire and a red safety flag. The vehicle has a compact, two-seat interior with bucket seats and a visible steering wheel. The suspension system is exposed, indicating high ground clearance and robust shock absorption for rough terrain. The overall design emphasizes durability, utility, and readiness for challenging environments.
description: A yellow and black open-top all-terrain vehicle with large knobby tires, a roll cage, and off-road accessories. It features a spare tire, auxiliary lights, and a rugged, reinforced frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the protective bumper, four auxiliary lights above the windshield, and the wide stance of the front tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, visible bucket seats, exposed suspension, and the spare tire with a red flag mounted at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tire, roll cage, rear fenders, and the vehicle's license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open cabin, suspension, and rear-mounted accessories.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose and uneven terrain, typical of all-terrain or off-road vehicles.
